caption: The video begins with a split-screen graphic. The left side features a green background with a diagram of a golden spiral and the text "Fibonacci 24/7" and "Larry Pesavento," with "FIBONACCI 24/7" and a "SIGN UP" button appearing below in bright yellow and blue. The right side is a white background displaying the logo "TFNN.com" and the phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS." This static composition remains unchanged through the first three frames. In the final frame, the screen transitions to a blurred, mirrored image of a man wearing a dark suit jacket and a white shirt. The transition creates a distorted visual effect where the man's image appears twice, side-by-side, as the previous informational graphics disappear from view.
